(MRI) coupled with a linear accelerator to deliver Magnetic Resonance-guided 
R
evidence.source_title: MRI-GUIDED RADIOTHERAPY FOR PROSTATE CANCER: A NEW PARADIGM.
evidence.raw_snippet:
PubMed ID: 36938552. 2022/10/01 00:00. PURPOSE: Early clinical results on the application of magnetic resonance imaging 
(MRI) coupled with a linear accelerator to deliver Magnetic Resonance-guided 
Radiation Therapy (MRgRT) have demonstrated feasibility for safe delivery of 
stereotactic body radiation therapy in treatment of oligometastatic disease. 
Here, we set out to review the clinical evidence and challenges associated with 
MRgRT in this setting.
METHODS AND MATERIALS: We performed a sys
